document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Wicheeda Project in Canada dated 2018.pdf
document.description: The report details the evaluation and resource estimation for the Wicheeda Rare Earth Element Project in British Columbia, supporting First Legacy Mining Corp.'s exploration and development activities.
